itemListElement.reviewBody: Few years ago this school was having good environment and good teachers but the situation has been changed now as the management of Padmshree Narendra Mohan sir has been taken over by a builder. If any parent write any email (complaining) to principal, she will treat that parent as her enemy as I have experienced the same.  Parents would not be allowed to enter the school and would be disrespected by everybody, even by the security guards. Coordinator is two steps ahead of the principal in misbehaving with the parents and the students. Principal pretend to be very polite and sweet but this is not her real face. She can go up to any extent to spoil the future of any student. She refused to promote my son to next class despite a good score (80%) just because of my emails which I wrote to her to make her aware about the behavior of  teachers and students but in return to that she tried to spoil my child's future. Monthly fee is quiet less in this school that's why they are able to run it otherwise this school do not have any moral values now.

itemReviewed.name: Padamshree N.N. Mohan Public School - Sector 5,Vasundhara
Padamshree N.N. Mohan Public School - Sector 5,Vasundhara

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Worst school ever. The school main task is to collect illegal money forcefully. And this school do partially between streams students.  If you are from humanity or commerce stream you will not be treated good only science students are treated well by teachers and specially by principal Mrs Shashi sharma. They also shows fake percentage of board students in their posters which you can see outside the school. The percentage of science students are written fake which shows their partiality. This year school has filled wrong subject code in 10th board class and due to which students suffered.
principal Mrs Shashi sharma have very much attitude she will not talk to you if you come to school regarding any query.
WORST SCHOOL EVER..... DONT BELIEVE IN GOOD REVIEWS THEY ARE PAID AND WRITTEN BY SCHOOL TEACHER'S

itemReviewed.name: Padamshree N.N. Mohan Public School - Sector 5,Vasundhara

itemListElement.reviewBody:
This is my only genuine review and this is my experience because unfortunately I took admission in this school or then I regretted it a lot.
When I see children taking admission, I feel bad for them.
Teachers are not supportive at all in fact they give the  character certificate to everyone very soon, even the principal Mrs Shashi sharma have very much attitude she will not talk to you if you come to school regarding any query. if you go to this school ,there will be a lot of problem in taking stream in 11th for sure. because the principal didn't give the right to the students for taking stream by their choice . The stream has been provided or else money has been asked.
Or the teacher didn't even speak English or if someone spoke more English than him then he would hate us and start torturing us.
IN SHORT- PLEASE DO NOT TAKE ADDMISSION HERE, SCHOOL ALSO DO A LOT OF BIG MISTAKES AS THIS YEAR THERE WAS A VERY BIG MISTAKE FOR CLASS 10 BOARD EXAM, THE STUDENTS SUFFERED BECAUSE OF THIS .  Or see that no one has given a review, only teachers have given it.
POINT - The school also collects illegal money forcefully.

If you want to take admission in this school then don't take.
this is a completely useless school
I have just passed 12 and  I have regretted taking admission
Here it is just a matter of looting the money or giving certificates through illegal means, it is the responsibility of all the schools to give such certificate and it is illegal to take money but the school says that without the money no one will get the anything.

I MADE A MISTAKE BY SENDING MY DAUGHTER TO THIS SCHOOL
